description_long: This kiosk features a modern, angular design with a prominent overhanging roof and a deep, open front cavity. The main body is constructed from smooth, painted metal panels in a reddish hue, with a sturdy cylindrical post supporting the structure vertically. The front face displays printed signage and a small interactive slot or dispenser, likely for tickets, pamphlets, or other small items. The side panels are emblazoned with bold white text, and the overall form is geometric and minimalist, with no visible windows or doors. The kiosk is compact and designed for outdoor urban environments, such as parks or sidewalks, where it serves as an information or distribution point.
description: A modern, angular kiosk with a deep open front, overhanging roof, and bold side signage, supported by a cylindrical post. Its smooth reddish metal panels and minimalist design make it suitable for urban public spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open cavity, interactive slot, and printed signage above the dispenser.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bold white text signage and the depth of the overhanging roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back panel and the supporting cylindrical post.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with matching white text signage and clear visibility of the kiosk's angular profile.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign with bold white text ('#BE PART OF ART') on both side panels and additional printed instructions or branding above the dispenser slot on the front face.
attribute_roof_design: Sloped, overhanging roof made of painted metal, with a clean, angular profile and no visible decorative elements.
